emergency_definition: Power outage affecting the whole property
Panel issues that cut power to critical equipment

emergency_routing_rules.fallback: Tell the caller a tech will call back within 30 minutes and page Dave via the internal system

non_emergency_routing_rules: Collect name, number, and nature of the job, then transfer to the front desk

call_transfer_rules.if_no_answer: Take a message and tell them we'll call back within 2 hours

integration_constraints: Do not create or cancel jobs
after_hours_flow_summary: Emergency calls are handled according to the emergency routing rules
office_hours_flow_summary: Collect information and transfer to the front desk
special_rules: VIP client: Denver Metro Hospital, escalate immediately to Sandra at 720-555-0411
notes: Bright Star Electrical is a commercial and residential electrical contractor with specific emergency and non-emergency handling procedures
